productDisplayName: Arrow Woman Venetia Navy Blue Sweater
description: Composition Navy cardigan made of 80% acrylic and 20% wool, has long sleeves, large fold-over ribbed collar, buttoned with two decorative black cord toggles at front, ribbed cuffs and hemline and small metal logo on lower front Fit Regular Wash care Dry clean only Do not bleach Do not wrinkle Dry flat Cool iron when needed This chunky knit cardigan from arrow woman is easy to take on and off depending on the changing temperature - ideal for those days when you're not sure about the weather. Smart enough to wear over a shirt at the office, the collar and front fastening give this cardi a sophisticated feminine touch Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5.8" and chest 33"
